general.g_text: 라면은 맛있지만 소금이 많이 들어 있어서 건강에 나쁩니다. ( ㉠ ) 라면의 소금은 보통 국물을 만드는 스프에 있습니다. ( ㉡ ) 그래도 국물을 먹고 싶으면 스프를 조금만 넣습니다. ( ㉢ ) 그리고 라면을 끓일 때 스프를 늦게 넣는 것도 소금을 덜 먹는 또 하나의 방법입니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Mì Ramen thì ngon nhưng có nhiều muối nên không tốt cho sức khỏe. ( ㉠ ) Muối trong mì thường có trong súp được dùng để nấu nước mì. ( ㉡ ) Dù vậy thì nếu muốn ăn nước mì thì cũng chỉ nên cho một chút súp. ( ㉢ ) Và thêm súp vào sau khi đun sôi mì cũng là một cách để ăn ít muối hơn. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: Ramen is delicious, but it is bad for your health because it has a lot of salt. <g>( ㉠ )</g> The salt of ramen is usually in the soup making ramen soup. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But if you want to eat the ramen soup, add a little bit of soup. <g>( ㉢ )</g> And adding soup after boiling ramen is another way to eat less salt. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
Le ramen est délicieux, mais il est mauvais pour la santé car il contient beaucoup de sel.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Le sel de ramen se trouve généralement dans la soupe pour faire de la soupe de ramen.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Mais si vous voulez manger la soupe de ramen, ajoutez un peu de soupe.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Et ajouter de la soupe après avoir fait bouillir des ramen est une autre façon de manger moins de sel.<g>( ㉣ )</g>


#######

Ramen is delicious, but it is bad for your health because it has a lot of salt. <g>( ㉠ )</g> The salt of ramen is usually in the soup making ramen soup. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But if you want to eat the ramen soup, add a little bit of soup. <g>( ㉢ )</g> And adding soup after boiling ramen is another way to eat less salt. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.es:
El ramen es delicioso, pero es malo para la salud porque tiene mucha sal.<g>( ㉠ )</g>La sal del ramen suele estar en la sopa para preparar la sopa de ramen.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Pero si quieres comer la sopa de ramen, agrega un poco de sopa.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Y agregar sopa después de hervir el ramen es otra forma de comer menos sal.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

content.q_text:
다음 문장이 들어갈 곳을 고르십시오: 
"그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다."

explain.vi:
Điền câu sau đây vào chỗ trống thích hợp: 
그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. 
Vì vậy nếu muốn ăn ít muối hơn thì không nên ăn nước mì gói. 
--------------------
그래서: Vì vậy, vì thế - Từ được dùng khi nội dung ở phía trước trở thành nguyên nhân, điều kiện hay căn cứ của nội dung ở phía sau. 

Muối có ở trong súp, khi nấu cho nhiều súp thì lúc uống nước mì sẽ ăn phải nhiều muối. Vì vậy muốn ăn ít muối thì không nên ăn nước mì.
explain.en:
Fill in the appropriate blank with this sentence: 
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
So if you want to eat less salt, you should not eat ramen soup. 
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g> Therefore, so - This word is used when the content in front becomes the cause, condition or basis of the content behind. 

Salt is in the soup, when you add a lot of soup into ramen soup, you will eat a lot of salt. So if you want to eat less salt, you shouldn't eat ramen soup.
explain.fr:
Remplissez le blanc approprié avec cette phrase :
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
Donc, si vous voulez manger moins salé, vous ne devriez pas manger de soupe ramen.
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>Par conséquent, donc - Ce mot est utilisé lorsque le contenu devant devient la cause, la condition ou la base du contenu derrière.

Le sel est dans la soupe, lorsque vous ajoutez beaucoup de soupe dans la soupe de ramen, vous mangerez beaucoup de sel. Donc, si vous voulez manger moins de sel, vous ne devriez pas manger de soupe ramen.

#######

Fill in the appropriate blank with this sentence:

So if you want to eat less salt, you should not eat ramen soup. 
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g> Therefore, so - This word is used when the content in front becomes the cause, condition or basis of the content behind. 

Salt is in the soup, when you add a lot of soup into ramen soup, you will eat a lot of salt. So if you want to eat less salt, you shouldn't eat ramen soup.
explain.es:
Complete el espacio en blanco apropiado con esta oración:
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
Entonces, si quieres comer menos sal, no debes comer sopa de ramen.
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>Por lo tanto, entonces - Esta palabra se usa cuando el contenido de enfrente se convierte en la causa, condición o base del contenido de atrás.

La sal está en la sopa, cuando agregas mucha sopa a la sopa de ramen, comerás mucha sal. Así que si quieres comer menos sal, no deberías comer sopa de ramen.

#######

--------------------
<g>그래서:</g> Therefore, so - This word is used when the content in front becomes the cause, condition or basis of the content behind. 

Salt is in the soup, when you add a lot of soup into ramen soup, you will eat a lot of salt. So if you want to eat less salt, you shouldn't eat ramen soup.

<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
Jadi jika Anda ingin makan lebih sedikit garam, sebaiknya jangan makan sup ramen.
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>Oleh karena itu, jadi - Kata ini digunakan ketika konten di depan menjadi penyebab, kondisi atau dasar dari konten di belakang.

Garam ada di dalam sup, ketika Anda menambahkan banyak sup ke dalam sup ramen, Anda akan makan banyak garam. Jadi jika Anda ingin makan lebih sedikit garam, sebaiknya Anda tidak makan sup ramen.

適切な空欄に次の文を入力してください。
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
だから、塩分を控えたいなら、ラーメンのスープは食べない方がいい。
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>したがって、そう - この言葉は、前の内容が後の内容の原因、条件、または根拠になる場合に使用されます。

スープには塩が入っており、ラーメンのスープにスープを多めに入れると塩分を多く摂ってしまいます。だから、塩分を控えたいなら、ラーメンのスープは食べないほうがいい。

--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>Deshalb so - Dieses Wort wird verwendet, wenn der Inhalt davor zur Ursache, Bedingung oder Grundlage des Inhalts dahinter wird.

Salz ist in der Suppe, wenn Sie viel Suppe in die Ramen-Suppe geben, werden Sie viel Salz essen. Wer also weniger Salz essen möchte, sollte keine Ramen-Suppe essen.

explain.it:
Completa lo spazio vuoto appropriato con questa frase:
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
Quindi, se vuoi mangiare meno sale, non dovresti mangiare la zuppa di ramen.
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g>Pertanto, quindi - Questa parola viene utilizzata quando il contenuto davanti diventa la causa, la condizione o la base del contenuto dietro.

Il sale è nella zuppa, quando aggiungi molta zuppa nella zuppa di ramen, mangerai molto sale. Quindi, se vuoi mangiare meno sale, non dovresti mangiare la zuppa di ramen.

#######

Fill in the appropriate blank with this sentence: 
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
So if you want to eat less salt, you should not eat ramen soup. 
--------------------
<g>그래서:</g> Therefore, so - This word is used when the content in front becomes the cause, condition or basis of the content behind. 

Salt is in the soup, when you add a lot of soup into ramen soup, you will eat a lot of salt. So if you want to eat less salt, you shouldn't eat ramen soup.

Соль содержится в супе: если вы добавите много супа в суп рамэн, вы съедите много соли. Поэтому, если вы хотите есть меньше соли, вам не следует есть суп рамэн.

Preencha o espaço em branco apropriado com esta frase:
<g>그래서 소금을 적게 먹으려면 라면 국물을 먹지 않는 게 좋습니다. </g>
Então, se você quiser comer menos sal, não deve comer sopa de ramen.
--------------------

O sal está na sopa, quando você adiciona muita sopa à sopa de ramen, você come muito sal. Então, se você quiser comer menos sal, não deve comer sopa de ramen.

q_answer: 스프를 먼저 넣으면 소금을 많이 먹게 됩니다.
라면의 소금을 적게 먹는 방법은 한 가지입니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn: 
1. Mì là thức ăn tốt cho sức khỏe. 
2. Nếu cho nhiều súp thì tốt cho sức khỏe. 
3. Nếu cho súp vào ngay từ đầu thì sẽ ăn nhiều muối hơn. 
4. Phương pháp ăn ít muối trong mì gói hơn. 
--------------------
라면을 끓일 때 스프를 늦게 넣는 것도 소금을 덜 먹는 또 하나의 방법입니다:  Thêm súp vào sau khi đun sôi mì cũng là một cách để ăn ít muối hơn. 

Vì vậy nếu cho súp vào ngay từ đầu thì sẽ ăn nhiều muối hơn.

2. If you add a lot of soup, it is good for your health. 
3. If you add the soup at the beginning, you will eat more salt. 
4. Method of eating less salt in Ramen noodles.

--------------------

=> Se você adicionar sopa no início, comerá mais sal.

#######

2. अगर आप ढेर सारा सूप मिलाते हैं तो यह आपकी सेहत के लिए अच्छा है।
3. अगर आप शुरुआत में ही सूप डालेंगे तो आप ज्यादा नमक खाएंगे.
4. रेमन नूडल्स में कम नमक खाने का तरीका.
------------------------
<g>라면을 끓일 때 스프를 늦게 넣는 것도 소금을 덜 먹는 또 하나의 방법입니다</g>: रेमन नूडल्स उबालने के बाद सूप डालना भी कम नमक खाने का एक तरीका है।

general.g_text: 저는 어릴 때부터 춤추는 것을 좋아했습니다. ( ㉠ )요즘도 매일 혼자 거울을 보면서 춤 연습을 합니다. ( ㉡ )주말에는 가끔 친구들과같이 지하철역이나 공원에서 공연도 합니다. ( ㉢ )사람들의 박수소리를 들으면 기분이 좋아져서 더 열심히 춤을 춥니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi thích nhảy từ khi còn bé. ( ㉠ ) Dạo gần đây, mỗi ngày tôi đều vừa đứng trước gương vừa tập nhảy một mình. ( ㉡ ) Vào cuối tuần, thi thoảng tôi sẽ cùng bạn bè biểu diễn ở ga tàu điện ngầm hoặc công viên. ( ㉢ ) Nghe tiếng vỗ tay của mọi người khiến tôi vui hơn và nhảy chăm chỉ, miệt mài hơn.
g_text_translate.en: I love to dance since I was a kid. <g>( ㉠ )</g> Lately, every day I stand in front of the mirror and practice dancing alone. <g>( ㉡ )</g> On weekends, sometimes I will perform with my friends at the subway station or in the park. <g>( ㉢ )</g> Hearing everyone's applause makes me happier and dance harder and harder. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
J'adore danser depuis que je suis enfant.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Dernièrement, tous les jours, je me tiens devant le miroir et je pratique la danse seule.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Le week-end, il m'arrive de jouer avec mes amis à la station de métro ou dans le parc.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Entendre les applaudissements de tout le monde me rend plus heureux et je danse de plus en plus fort.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

content.q_text:
다음 문장이 들어갈 곳을 고르십시오: 
"사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다."

explain.vi:
Điền câu sau đây vào chỗ trống thích hợp: 
사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다. 
Mọi người vừa xem chúng tôi nhảy, vừa vỗ tay và hò hét. 
--------------------
박수를 치다: Vỗ tay
소리를 지르다: Hò hét, la hét

Mọi người vỗ tay và la hét nên nhân vật nhảy chăm chỉ hơn. Hai câu này xảy ra theo thứ tự lần lượt và liên quan trực tiếp tới nhau.
explain.en:
Fill in the appropriate blank with the following sentences:
<g>사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다. </g>
People were watching us dance, clapping and shouting.
--------------------
<g>박수를 치다</g>: To applaud
<g>소리를 지르다</g>: To shout

Everyone clapped and shouted so the character danced harder. These two sentences occur in sequential order and are directly related to each other.
explain.fr:
Remplissez le blanc approprié avec les phrases suivantes :
<g>사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다. </g>
Les gens nous regardaient danser, applaudir et crier.
--------------------
<g>박수를 치다</g>: Applaudir
<g>소리를 지르다</g>: Crier

Tout le monde a applaudi et crié pour que le personnage danse plus fort. Ces deux phrases apparaissent dans un ordre séquentiel et sont directement liées l'une à l'autre.

#######

Fill in the appropriate blank with the following sentences:
<g>사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다. </g>
People were watching us dance, clapping and shouting.
--------------------
<g>박수를 치다</g>: To applaud
<g>소리를 지르다</g>: To shout

Everyone clapped and shouted so the character danced harder. These two sentences occur in sequential order and are directly related to each other.

Complete el espacio en blanco correspondiente con las siguientes oraciones:
<g>사람들은 우리의 춤을 보고 박수를 치면서 소리를 지릅니다. </g>
La gente nos miraba bailar, aplaudía y gritaba.
--------------------
<g>박수를 치다</g>: aplaudir
<g>소리를 지르다</g>: Gritar

Todos aplaudieron y gritaron para que el personaje bailara con más fuerza. Estas dos oraciones ocurren en orden secuencial y están directamente relacionadas entre sí.

--------------------
<g>박수를 치다</g>: Bertepuk tangan

Semua orang bertepuk tangan dan berteriak agar karakter itu menari lebih keras. Kedua kalimat ini terjadi secara berurutan dan berhubungan langsung satu sama lain.

全員が拍手したり叫んだりしたので、キャラクターはより激しく踊りました。これらの 2 つの文は順番に発生し、互いに直接関連しています。

general.g_text: 우리 어머니와 아버지는 모두 일을 하셔서 집에 혼자 있는 날이 많았습니다. ( ㉠ )혼자 있으면 보통 게임을 하면서 시간을 보냈습니다.  ( ㉡ )그런데 어머니가 강아지를 사 오시면서 제 생활이 달라졌습니다. ( ㉢ ) 강아지와 함께 놀고 같이 산책도 하면서 시간을 보내게 되었습니다. ( ㉣ )저는 게임보다 더 좋은 친구를 갖게 되었습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Bố mẹ đều đi làm nên có nhiều hôm tôi phải ở nhà một mình. ( ㉠ ) Lúc ở một mình, tôi thường dành thời gian chơi game. (㉡) Nhưng sinh hoạt của tôi đã thay đổi kể từ khi mẹ mua cho tôi một chú chó con. ( ㉢) Tôi dành thời gian chơi với chú chó của mình, và còn cùng nhau đi dạo nữa. (㉣) Tôi đã có được một người bạn tốt thay vì một trò chơi điện tử.
g_text_translate.en: My parents both work, so there are days when I have to stay home alone. <g>( ㉠ )</g> When I'm alone, I often spend time playing games. <g>(㉡)</g> But my life has changed since my mother bought me a puppy. <g>( ㉢)</g> I spend time playing with my dog, and even go for a walk together. <g>(㉣)</g> I got a good friend instead of a video game.
g_text_translate.fr:
Mes parents travaillent tous les deux, donc il y a des jours où je dois rester seul à la maison.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Quand je suis seul, je passe souvent du temps à jouer à des jeux.<g>(㉡)</g>Mais ma vie a changé depuis que ma mère m'a acheté un chiot.<g>( ㉢)</g>Je passe du temps à jouer avec mon chien et je vais même me promener ensemble.<g>(㉣)</g>J'ai un bon ami au lieu d'un jeu vidéo.

#######

My parents both work, so there are days when I have to stay home alone. <g>( ㉠ )</g> When I'm alone, I often spend time playing games. <g>(㉡)</g> But my life has changed since my mother bought me a puppy. <g>( ㉢)</g> I spend time playing with my dog, and even go for a walk together. <g>(㉣)</g> I got a good friend instead of a video game.
g_text_translate.es:
Mis padres trabajan, así que hay días en los que tengo que quedarme solo en casa.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Cuando estoy solo, a menudo paso el tiempo jugando.<g>(㉡)</g>Pero mi vida ha cambiado desde que mi madre me compró un cachorro.<g>( ㉢)</g>Paso tiempo jugando con mi perro e incluso salgo a caminar juntos.<g>(㉣)</g>Tengo un buen amigo en lugar de un videojuego.

#######

다음 문장이 들어갈 곳을 고르십시오: 
"한 번 컴퓨터 앞에 앉으면 밥도 안 먹고 게임을 할 때도 있었습니다."

explain.vi:
Điền câu sau đây vào chỗ trống thích hợp: 
한 번 컴퓨터 앞에 앉으면 밥도 안 먹고 게임을 할 때도 있었습니다. 
Có những lúc chỉ cần ngồi trước máy tính thôi là tôi cứ ngồi chơi game mà không thèm ăn cơm. 
--------------------
게임하다: Chơi game

Câu trước ㉡ nói về những lúc có thời gian rảnh nhân vật sẽ chơi game, và câu cần điền bổ sung thêm thông tin cho câu đó.

<g>게임하다</g>: To play games

general.g_text: 걷기는 많은 사람들이 쉽게 할 수 있는 운동입니다. ( ㉠ ) 걷는 것은 건강에 도움이 많이 됩니다. ( ㉡ ) 다리만 움직이면서 걷는 것이 아니고 온몸이 움직이게 되기 때문입니다. ( ㉢ ) 그런데 걷기 운동을 할 때에는 천천히 걷기 시작해서 조금씩 빨리 걷는 것이 좋습니다.  ( ㉣ ) 이렇게 하는 것이 건강에 도움이 더 많이 됩니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Đi bộ là một môn thể thao mà mọi người có thể dễ dàng thực hiện. ( ㉠ ) Đi bộ giúp ích rất nhiều cho sức khỏe. ( ㉡ )Việc đi bộ không phải chỉ là chuyển động chân mà còn là chuyển động cả cơ thể. ( ㉢ ) Tuy nhiên khi đi bộ thì nên bắt đầu đi từ từ sau đó mới đi bộ nhanh dần. ( ㉣ ) Làm như vậy sẽ tốt cho sức khỏe. 
--------------------
A/V/Mệnh đề + 는 + N: Hình thức danh từ hóa; động từ, tính từ, mệnh đề trước 는 bổ nghĩa cho danh từ đứng sau. 
V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다: Có thể làm gì đó.
g_text_translate.en: Walking is a sport that everyone can easily do. <g>( ㉠ )</g> Walking is very beneficial for health. <g>( ㉡ )</g> Walking is not only a movement of the legs, but also of the whole body.<g> ( ㉢ )</g> However, when walking, you should start walking slowly and then walk faster. <g>( ㉣ )</g> Doing so is good for health.

Escolha a resposta que corresponde ao conteúdo da passagem:
1. Ao caminhar, as pessoas movimentam todo o corpo.
2. Andar apenas com as pernas em movimento faz bem à saúde.
3. Recomenda-se caminhar rápido no início do exercício de caminhada.
4. Caminhar devagar e por muito tempo é mais benéfico para a saúde.
--------------------
<g>처음부터</g>: Desde o princípio.

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage:
1. When walking, people move their whole body.
2. Walking with only your legs moving is good for your health.
3. It is recommended to walk fast at the beginning of the walking exercise.
4. Walking slowly and long is more beneficial to health.
--------------------
<g>처음부터</g>: From the very beginning.
explain.hi:
वह उत्तर चुनें जो अनुच्छेद की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो:
1. चलते समय लोग अपना पूरा शरीर हिलाते हैं।
2. केवल पैर हिलाकर चलना आपके स्वास्थ्य के लिए अच्छा है।
3. वॉकिंग एक्सरसाइज की शुरुआत में तेज चलने की सलाह दी जाती है।
4. धीरे-धीरे और लंबा चलना सेहत के लिए ज्यादा फायदेमंद होता है।
------------------------
<g>처음부터</g>: एकदम शुरू से।

4. Walking slowly and long is more beneficial to health.

1. İnsanlar yürürken tüm vücutlarını hareket ettirirler.
2. Sadece bacaklarınızı hareket ettirerek yürümek sağlığınız için iyidir.
3. Yürüme egzersizinin başlangıcında hızlı yürümeniz tavsiye edilir.
4. Yavaş ve uzun yürümek sağlığa daha faydalıdır.
--------------------

general.g_text: 우리 할머니는 ‘한글 공부방’에 다니십니다. ( ㉠ ) ‘한글 공부방’은 한글을 모르는 노인들이 다니는 곳입니다. ( ㉡ ) 할머니는 이곳에서 3달 동안 한글을 배우셨습니다. ( ㉢ ) 할머니는 내일 선생님께 감사의 편지를 드리려고 합니다. ( ㉣ ) 그래서 오늘 열심히 편지를 쓰셨습니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Bà tôi đi đến "phòng học tiếng Hàn". ( ㉠ )"Phòng học tiếng Hàn" là nơi những người già không biết tiếng Hàn đến để học. ( ㉡ ) Bà tôi đã học tiếng Hàn ở đây trong vòng 3 tháng. ( ㉢ ) Bà định ngày mai sẽ gửi thư cảm ơn đến giáo viên. ( ㉣ ) Vì vậy hôm nay bà đã chăm chỉ viết thư. 
--------------------
A/V/Mệnh đề + 는 + N: Hình thức danh từ hóa; động từ, tính từ, mệnh đề trước 는 bổ nghĩa cho danh từ đứng sau.
g_text_translate.en: My grandmother goes to the ‘Hangeul study room’. <g>( ㉠ )</g> ‘Hangeul study room’ is a place for elderly people who do not know Hangeul. <g>( ㉡ )</g> Grandma studied Hangul for three months here. <g>(㉢)</g> Grandma is going to give her teacher a letter of her thanks tomorrow. <g>(㉣)</g> So, she wrote a letter today.
g_text_translate.fr:

#######

general.g_text: 우리 동네 산에는 동물들이 많이 살고 있습니다. ( ㉠ ) 그런데 겨울에는 산에 동물들이 먹을 것이 별로 없습니다. ( ㉡ ) 그래서 저와 동네 사람들은 겨울이 되면 산에 가서 먹을 것을 놓고 옵니다. ( ㉢ ) 토끼나 산새들이 다 먹은 것입니다. ( ㉣ ) 추운 겨울에 먹을 것을 가지고 산에 올라가는 것이 힘들지만 우리는 매년 기분 좋게 이 일을 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Có nhiều loài động vật sống trên núi quanh làng chúng tôi. ( ㉠ ) Nhưng vào mùa đông, động vật trên núi không có nhiều thức ăn. ( ㉡ ) Vì vậy tôi và người dân trong làng sẽ đi lên núi và để lại đồ ăn cho chúng. ( ㉢ ) Thỏ và chim rừng đã ăn hết chỗ đồ ăn đó. ( ㉣ ) Mang đồ ăn lên núi vào mùa đông rất vất vả nhưng mỗi năm chúng tôi đều vui vẻ làm việc này.
g_text_translate.en: There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il y a beaucoup d'animaux vivant dans la montagne de mon quartier. Mais en hiver, il n'y a pas beaucoup de nourriture pour les animaux dans la montagne. Alors quand l'hiver arrive, les gens du quartier et moi allons à la montagne et leur donnons à manger. Quand nous revenons quelques jours plus tard, il ne reste plus rien. Les lapins et les oiseaux de montagne ont tout mangé. Il est difficile de gravir la montagne en transportant de la nourriture en hiver, mais nous le faisons avec plaisir chaque année.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.es:
Hay muchos animales viviendo en la montaña de mi barrio. Pero en invierno, no hay mucha comida para los animales en la montaña. Entonces cuando llega el invierno, la gente del barrio y yo vamos al monte y les damos de comer. Cuando volvemos unos días después, no queda nada. Los conejos y los pájaros de montaña se lo comieron todo. Es difícil subir la montaña llevando comida en el frío invierno, pero lo hacemos felizmente todos los años.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.id:
Ada banyak hewan yang hidup di gunung di lingkungan saya. Tetapi di musim dingin, tidak banyak makanan untuk hewan di gunung. Jadi ketika musim dingin tiba, orang-orang di lingkungan saya dan saya pergi ke gunung dan memberi mereka makanan. Ketika kami kembali beberapa hari kemudian, tidak ada yang tersisa. Kelinci dan burung gunung memakan semuanya. Sulit untuk mendaki gunung sambil membawa makanan di musim dingin, tapi kami melakukannya dengan gembira setiap tahun.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.ja:
私の近所の山にはたくさんの動物が住んでいます。しかし、冬になると山には動物の餌があまりありません。だから冬になると近所の人たちと一緒に山に行ってご飯をあげます。数日後に戻ると、何も残っていません。ウサギと山鳥が全部食べてしまいました。寒い冬に食べ物を持って山に登るのは大変ですが、毎年楽しく登っています。

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.de:
In den Bergen in meiner Nachbarschaft leben viele Tiere. Aber im Winter gibt es im Berg nicht viel Futter für die Tiere. Wenn der Winter kommt, gehen die Leute aus der Nachbarschaft und ich auf den Berg und geben ihnen Essen. Als wir ein paar Tage später zurückkommen, ist nichts mehr da. Kaninchen und Bergvögel haben alles gefressen. Es ist schwer, im kalten Winter mit Essen auf den Berg zu steigen, aber wir tun dies jedes Jahr mit Freude.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我附近的山上有很多动物。但在冬天，山上动物的食物不多。所以冬天来了，我和附近的人就上山给他们吃。几天后我们回来时，什么都没有了。兔子和山鸟都吃光了。在寒冷的冬天背着食物上山很难，但我们每年都开心地这样做。

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我附近的山上有很多動物。但在冬天，山上動物的食物不多。所以冬天來了，我和附近的人就上山給他們吃。幾天后我們回來時，什麼都沒有了。兔子和山鳥都吃光了。在寒冷的冬天背著食物上山很難，但我們每年都開心地這樣做。

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.it:
Ci sono molti animali che vivono in montagna nel mio quartiere. Ma in inverno non c'è molto cibo per gli animali in montagna. Così, quando arriva l'inverno, io e la gente del vicinato andiamo in montagna e diamo loro da mangiare. Quando torniamo qualche giorno dopo, non c'è più niente. Conigli e uccelli di montagna mangiavano tutto. È difficile salire sulla montagna portando il cibo nel freddo inverno, ma lo facciamo felicemente ogni anno.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.ru:
В горах моего района живет много животных. Но зимой в горах корма для животных мало. Поэтому, когда приходит зима, мы с соседями идем в горы и кормим их. Когда мы возвращаемся через несколько дней, там уже ничего не осталось. Все это съели кролики и горные птицы. Холодной зимой трудно подняться на гору с едой, но мы с радостью делаем это каждый год.

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.th:
มีสัตว์มากมายอาศัยอยู่บนภูเขาในละแวกบ้านของฉัน แต่ในฤดูหนาวบนภูเขาจะมีอาหารให้สัตว์ไม่มากนัก เมื่อฤดูหนาวมาถึง ฉันและคนในละแวกนั้นจึงไปที่ภูเขาและให้อาหารพวกเขา พอเรากลับมาอีกไม่กี่วันก็ไม่เหลืออะไรแล้ว กระต่ายและนกภูเขากินหมด ฤดูหนาวที่หนาวเหน็บการขึ้นภูเขาถืออาหารเป็นเรื่องยาก แต่เราทำเช่นนี้ทุกปีอย่างมีความสุข

#######

There are many animals living in the mountain in my neighborhood. But in winter, there is not much food for animals in the mountain. So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. It's hard to go up the mountain while carrying food in the cold winter, but we do this happily every year.
g_text_translate.pt:
Há muitos animais vivendo na montanha do meu bairro. Mas no inverno não há muita comida para os animais na montanha. Então, quando chega o inverno, as pessoas da vizinhança e eu vamos para a montanha e lhes damos comida. Quando voltamos alguns dias depois, não sobrou nada. Coelhos e pássaros da montanha comeram tudo. É difícil subir a montanha carregando comida no inverno frio, mas fazemos isso com alegria todos os anos.

#######

So when winter comes, people in the neighborhood and I go to the mountain and give them food. When we return a few days later, there is nothing left. Rabbits and mountain birds ate it all. g_text_translate.hi:
मेरे पड़ोस में पहाड़ पर बहुत सारे जानवर रहते हैं। लेकिन सर्दियों में पहाड़ में जानवरों के लिए ज्यादा भोजन नहीं होता. इसलिए जब सर्दी आती है, तो मैं और आस-पड़ोस के लोग पहाड़ पर जाते हैं और उन्हें खाना देते हैं। कुछ दिन बाद जब हम लौटे तो कुछ भी नहीं बचा था। खरगोशों और पहाड़ी पक्षियों ने वह सब खा लिया। कड़ाके की ठंड में भोजन लेकर पहाड़ पर चढ़ना कठिन है, लेकिन हम हर साल खुशी-खुशी ऐसा करते हैं।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Mahallemdeki dağda yaşayan çok sayıda hayvan var. Ancak kışın dağda hayvanlar için fazla yiyecek bulunmuyor. Kış geldiğinde mahalledeki insanlar ve ben dağa çıkıp onlara yemek veriyoruz. Birkaç gün sonra döndüğümüzde geriye hiçbir şey kalmamış. Hepsini tavşanlar ve dağ kuşları yedi. Soğuk kış aylarında yiyecek taşırken dağa çıkmak zor ama bunu her yıl mutlu bir şekilde yapıyoruz.

#######

content.q_text:
다음 문장이 들어갈 곳을 고르십시오:
며칠 후에 다시 가 보면 우리가 놓고 온 것이 하나도 없습니다.

explain.vi:
Điền câu sau đây vào chỗ trống thích hợp. 
며칠 후에 다시 가 보면 우리가 놓고 온 것이 하나도 없습니다. 
Khi chúng tôi quay lại vài ngày sau đó thì thấy không còn bất kỳ thứ gì cả. 
--------------------
산새: Chim rừng, chim núi
하나도 없다: Một cái cũng không có/không còn, một chút cũng không

Chọn đáp án 3 vì sau ㉢ là câu giải thích cho câu phía trên (Thỏ và chim núi đã ăn hết thức ăn).
explain.en:
Fill the following sentence into the appropriate blank.
<g>며칠 후에 다시 가 보면 우리가 놓고 온 것이 하나도 없습니다.</g>
When we return a few days later, there is nothing left.
--------------------
<g>산새:</g> Forest bird, mountain bird
<g>하나도 없다:</g> Not even one/not even a little bit

Choose 3 because after <g>㉢</g> is the explanation for the sentence before (Rabbits and mountains bird ate all the food).
explain.fr:

<g>산새:</g>Oiseau forestier, oiseau de montagne
<g>하나도 없다:</g>Pas même un/pas même un tout petit peu

Choisissez 3 parce qu'après<g>㉢</g>est l'explication de la phrase précédente (Les lapins et les oiseaux des montagnes ont mangé toute la nourriture).

Choose 3 because after <g>㉢</g> is the explanation for the sentence before (Rabbits and mountains bird ate all the food).

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 우리 동네 산에는 토끼가 살지 않습니다.
동물들은 우리가 산에 놓고 온 것을 먹습니다.
저는 힘들어서 산에 올라가는 것을 싫어합니다.
동물들은 먹을 것을 찾으려고 산에서 내려옵니다.

general.g_text: 사람들은 보통 좋아하는 텔레비전 프로그램을 볼 때 조용히 봅니다. ( ㉠ ) 그러나 우리 가족은 다릅니다. ( ㉡ ) 드라마와 뉴스 이야기도 하지만 나와 아내의 회사 이야기도 하고 아이들의 학교 이야기도 합니다. ( ㉢ )텔레비전 소리를 못 들을 때가 있지만 가족들과 함께하는 이 시간이 정말 즐겁습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Mọi người thường yên lặng xem khi xem chương trình truyền hình yêu thích của mình. (㉠) Nhưng gia đình tôi thì khác. ( ㉡ ) Chúng tôi thường trò chuyện về phim hoặc tin tức nhưng cũng có lúc tôi và vợ nói về chuyện ở công ty hay chuyện học hành của con cái. ( ㉢ ) Có những lúc tôi không thể nghe thấy tiếng TV nhưng tôi thực sự rất vui khi được tận hưởng khoảng thời gian này cùng gia đình. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les gens regardent généralement tranquillement leurs programmes télévisés préférés. Mais ma famille est différente. On parle beaucoup en regardant la télé. On parle de drames et d'actualités, mais on parle aussi de mon entreprise, de l'entreprise de ma femme et de l'école des enfants. Il y a des moments où je n'entends pas la télé, mais j'apprécie vraiment ce moment avec ma famille.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.es:
La gente suele ver sus programas de televisión favoritos en silencio. Pero mi familia es diferente. Hablamos mucho mientras vemos la televisión. Hablamos de dramas y noticias, pero también hablamos de mi empresa, la empresa de mi esposa y la escuela de mis hijos. Hay momentos en los que no puedo escuchar la televisión, pero realmente disfruto este tiempo con mi familia.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.id:
Orang-orang biasanya menonton program TV favorit mereka dengan tenang. Tapi keluargaku berbeda. Kami banyak berbicara sambil menonton TV. Kami berbicara tentang drama dan berita, tetapi kami juga berbicara tentang perusahaan saya, perusahaan istri saya dan sekolah anak-anak. Ada kalanya saya tidak bisa mendengar TV, tetapi saya sangat menikmati saat ini bersama keluarga.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.ja:
人々は通常、お気に入りのテレビ番組を静かに見ています。でも、私の家族は違います。私たちはテレビを見ながらたくさん話します。ドラマやニュースの話もしますが、自分の会社、妻の会社、子供の学校の話もします。テレビの音が聞こえない時もありますが、家族と一緒にいる時間は本当に楽しいです。

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.de:
Die Leute sehen sich ihre Lieblingsfernsehprogramme normalerweise leise an. Aber meine Familie ist anders. Wir reden viel beim Fernsehen. Wir sprechen über Dramen und Nachrichten, aber wir sprechen auch über meine Firma, die Firma meiner Frau und die Kinderschule. Manchmal kann ich den Fernseher nicht hören, aber ich genieße diese Zeit mit meiner Familie sehr.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
人们通常安静地观看自己喜欢的电视节目。但我的家人不一样。我们边看电视边聊很多。我们谈论戏剧和新闻，但我们也谈论我的公司，我妻子的公司和儿童学校。有时我听不见电视，但我真的很享受和家人在一起的这段时间。

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
當人們觀看自己喜歡的電視節目時，他們通常會安靜地觀看。但我的家人不一樣。我們一邊看電視一邊聊了很多。我們談論戲劇和新聞，但我們也談論我妻子的工作和我孩子的學校。有時我聽不到電視的聲音，但我真的很享受和家人相處的時光。

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.it:
Le persone di solito guardano i loro programmi TV preferiti in silenzio. Ma la mia famiglia è diversa. Parliamo molto mentre guardiamo la TV. Si parla di fiction e di cronaca, ma si parla anche della mia compagnia, di quella di mia moglie e della scuola per bambini. Ci sono momenti in cui non riesco a sentire la TV, ma mi diverto molto con la mia famiglia.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.ru:
Люди обычно спокойно смотрят свои любимые телепрограммы. Но моя семья другая. Мы много разговариваем, пока смотрим телевизор. Мы говорим о драмах и новостях, но также говорим о моей компании, компании моей жены и детской школе. Бывают моменты, когда я не слышу телевизор, но мне очень нравится проводить время с семьей.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.th:
ผู้คนมักจะดูรายการทีวีโปรดอย่างเงียบๆ แต่ครอบครัวของฉันแตกต่างออกไป เราพูดคุยกันมากในขณะที่ดูทีวี เราพูดถึงละครและข่าว แต่เรายังพูดถึงบริษัทของฉัน บริษัทของภรรยา และโรงเรียนของลูกด้วย มีหลายครั้งที่ฉันไม่ได้ยินเสียงทีวี แต่ฉันสนุกกับเวลานี้กับครอบครัวมาก

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.pt:
As pessoas geralmente assistem seus programas de TV favoritos em silêncio. Mas minha família é diferente. Conversamos muito enquanto assistimos TV. Falamos de dramas e novidades, mas também falamos da minha empresa, da empresa da minha esposa e da escola dos filhos. Há momentos em que não consigo ouvir a TV, mas gosto muito desse tempo com minha família.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.hi:
लोग आमतौर पर अपने पसंदीदा टीवी कार्यक्रम चुपचाप देखते हैं। लेकिन मेरा परिवार अलग है. हम टीवी देखते हुए खूब बातें करते हैं. हम नाटकों और समाचारों के बारे में बात करते हैं, लेकिन हम अपनी कंपनी, मेरी पत्नी की कंपनी और बच्चों के स्कूल के बारे में भी बात करते हैं। कई बार मैं टीवी नहीं सुन पाता, लेकिन मैं वास्तव में अपने परिवार के साथ इस समय का आनंद लेता हूं।

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.
g_text_translate.tr:
İnsanlar genellikle en sevdikleri TV programlarını sessizce izlerler. Ama benim ailem farklı. Televizyon izlerken çok konuşuyoruz. Dramalardan, haberlerden konuşuyoruz ama aynı zamanda benim şirketimden, eşimin şirketinden ve çocukların okulundan da bahsediyoruz. Televizyonun sesini duyamadığım zamanlar oluyor ama ailemle geçirdiğim bu zamandan gerçekten keyif alıyorum.

#######

People usually watch their favorite TV programs quietly. But my family is different. We talk a lot while watching TV. We talk about dramas and news, but we also talk about my company, my wife's company and children's school. There are times when I can't hear the TV, but I really enjoy this time with my family.

2. मेरे परिवार को अन्य टीवी कार्यक्रम पसंद हैं।
3. मैं टीवी के कारण अपने परिवार की कहानियाँ नहीं सुन सकता।
4. मेरे परिवार को एक साथ टीवी देखना नापसंद है।
------------------------
<g>회사에 다니다:</g>काम पर जाना, किसी कंपनी में काम करना।

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. My wife and I work for a company.
2. My family likes other TV programs.
3. I can't hear my family's stories because of the TV.
4. My family hates watching TV together.
--------------------
<g>회사에 다니다:</g> To go to work, to work at a company.
explain.tr:
Paragrafa karşılık gelen seçeneği seçin.
1. Eşim ve ben bir şirkette çalışıyoruz.
2. Ailem diğer TV programlarını sever.
3. Televizyon yüzünden ailemin hikayelerini duyamıyorum.
4. Ailem birlikte televizyon izlemekten nefret ediyor.
--------------------
<g>회사에 다니다:</g>İşe gitmek, bir şirkette çalışmak.

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. My wife and I work for a company.
2. My family likes other TV programs.
3. I can't hear my family's stories because of the TV.
4. My family hates watching TV together.
--------------------
<g>회사에 다니다:</g> To go to work, to work at a company.

general.g_text: 저는 피아노 학원에 다닌 지 3년이 되었습니다. ( ㉠ ) 그렇지만 지금은 여러 노래들을 잘 칠 수 있게 되었습니다. ( ㉡ ) 피아노를 치면서 좋아하는 가수의 노래를 부르면 정말 즐거워집니다. ( ㉢ ) 피아노를 배우는 것이 정말 좋습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi đã đi học ở học viện piano được 3 năm rồi.  ( ㉠ ) Nhưng bây giờ tôi có thể chơi nhiều bài hát khác nhau. ( ㉡ ) Vừa chơi piano vừa hát bài hát của ca sĩ yêu thích thật sự rất vui. ( ㉢ ) Học piano thật sự rất tốt. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.fr:
Cela fait 3 ans que je suis allé dans une académie de piano. Au début, je ne savais pas du tout jouer du piano. Mais maintenant, je peux bien jouer beaucoup de chansons. Chanter une chanson de mon chanteur préféré tout en jouant du piano me rend vraiment heureux. C'est vraiment bien d'apprendre le piano.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.es:
Han pasado 3 años desde que fui a una academia de piano. Al principio, no podía tocar el piano en absoluto. Pero ahora puedo tocar muchas canciones bien. Cantar una canción de mi cantante favorito mientras toco el piano me hace muy feliz. Es muy bueno aprender piano.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.id:
Sudah 3 tahun sejak saya pergi ke akademi piano. Awalnya, saya tidak bisa bermain piano sama sekali. Tapi sekarang saya bisa memainkan banyak lagu dengan baik. Menyanyikan lagu penyanyi favorit saya sambil bermain piano membuat saya sangat senang. Sangat bagus untuk belajar piano.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.ja:
ピアノ専門学校に通い始めて3年。最初はピアノが全然弾けませんでした。でも今はたくさんの曲を上手に演奏できるようになりました。ピアノを弾きながら好きな歌手の歌を歌うのは本当に幸せです。ピアノを習って本当に良かったです。

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.de:
Es ist 3 Jahre her, seit ich an einer Klavierakademie war. Anfangs konnte ich überhaupt kein Klavier spielen. Aber jetzt kann ich viele Lieder gut spielen. Ein Lied meines Lieblingssängers zu singen, während ich Klavier spiele, macht mich wirklich glücklich. Es ist wirklich gut, Klavier zu lernen.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我去钢琴学院已经3年了。起初，我根本不会弹钢琴。但现在我可以很好地演奏很多歌曲。一边弹钢琴一边唱我最喜欢的歌手的歌，真的很开心。学钢琴真的很好。

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我去鋼琴學院已經3年了。起初，我根本不會彈鋼琴。但現在我可以很好地演奏很多歌曲。一邊彈鋼琴一邊唱我最喜歡的歌手的歌，真的很開心。學鋼琴真的很好。

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.it:
Sono passati 3 anni da quando sono andato a un'accademia di pianoforte. All'inizio non riuscivo affatto a suonare il piano. Ma ora so suonare bene molte canzoni. Cantare una canzone del mio cantante preferito mentre suono il pianoforte mi rende davvero felice. È davvero bello imparare il pianoforte.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.ru:
Прошло 3 года с тех пор, как я пошел в фортепианную академию. Сначала я вообще не умел играть на фортепиано. Но теперь я могу хорошо играть многие песни. Исполнение песни моего любимого певца под игру на фортепиано доставляет мне огромное удовольствие. Очень хорошо учиться игре на фортепиано.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.th:
เป็นเวลา 3 ปีแล้วที่ฉันเข้าโรงเรียนสอนเปียโน ตอนแรกฉันไม่สามารถเล่นเปียโนได้เลย แต่ตอนนี้เล่นได้หลายเพลงดี การร้องเพลงของนักร้องคนโปรดขณะเล่นเปียโนทำให้ฉันมีความสุขมาก การเรียนเปียโนเป็นสิ่งที่ดีจริงๆ

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.pt:
Já se passaram 3 anos desde que fui para uma academia de piano. No início, eu não conseguia tocar piano. Mas agora posso tocar muitas músicas bem. Cantar uma música do meu cantor favorito enquanto toco piano me deixa muito feliz. É muito bom aprender piano.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.hi:
मुझे पियानो अकादमी में गए तीन साल हो गए हैं। पहले तो मैं बिल्कुल भी पियानो नहीं बजा पाता था। लेकिन अब मैं कई गाने अच्छे से बजा सकता हूं. पियानो बजाते समय अपने पसंदीदा गायक का गाना गाना मुझे वास्तव में खुशी देता है। पियानो सीखना वाकई अच्छा है।

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.
g_text_translate.tr:
Piyano akademisine gideli 3 yıl oldu. İlk başta piyanoyu hiç çalamıyordum. Ama artık birçok şarkıyı iyi çalabiliyorum. Piyano çalarken en sevdiğim şarkıcının şarkısını söylemek beni gerçekten mutlu ediyor. Piyano öğrenmek gerçekten çok güzel.

#######

It has been 3 years since I went to a piano academy. At first, I couldn't play the piano at all. But now I can play many songs well. Singing a song of my favorite singer while playing the piano makes me really happy. It's really good to learn piano.

V + 게 되다: Trở nên.

--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄴ지 + N + 되다:</g> It has been <g>N</g> since someone did something.
<g>V + 게 되다:</g> To become.

Sentences 1 and 2 do not have a connection in meaning, the sentence to be filled out helps to explain and connect the two sentences together.

g_text_translate.vi: Cuối tuần tôi thường không đi ra ngoài mà chỉ ở nhà dọn dẹp, nghỉ ngơi và đọc sách. ( ㉠ ) Vì tôi phải đi làm từ thứ hai đến thứ sáu nên tôi cảm thấy rất bận bịu và mệt mỏi. ( ㉡ ) Nhưng cuối tuần trước tôi đã cùng bạn đi tới làng dân tộc. ( ㉢ ) Tôi thấy rất vui nên tuần sau tôi định tiếp tục đi công viên quốc gia. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: I don't usually go out on the weekends, I just read books, clean, and rest at home.  <g>( ㉠ )</g> Because I have to go to work from Monday to Friday, so I am very busy and tired. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But last weekend, I went to the folk village with my friend. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I feel so good that I am planning to go to the national park next week. <g>( ㉣ )</g>

मैं आमतौर पर सप्ताहांत पर बाहर नहीं जाता, मैं बस किताबें पढ़ता हूं, साफ-सफाई करता हूं और घर पर आराम करता हूं।<g>( ㉠ )</g>चूँकि मुझे सोमवार से शुक्रवार तक काम पर जाना होता है, इसलिए मैं बहुत व्यस्त और थका हुआ रहता हूँ।<g>( ㉡ )</g>लेकिन पिछले सप्ताहांत, मैं अपने दोस्त के साथ लोक गांव गया था।<g>( ㉢ )</g>मुझे इतना अच्छा लग रहा है कि मैं अगले सप्ताह राष्ट्रीय उद्यान जाने की योजना बना रहा हूं।<g>( ㉣ )</g>

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Cuối tuần tôi thường đi tới làng dân tộc.
2. Tuần trước tôi đi tới làng dân tộc một mình.
3. Tôi phải làm việc vào các ngày trong tuần nên rất mệt.
4. Cuối tuần tôi không đọc sách ở nhà mà xem phim.
--------------------
피곤하다: Mệt mỏi

V/A + 기 때문이다: Vì ... nên.
V + 아/어야 하다: Phải, nên làm gì.

Câu 3 là đáp án đúng vì người này làm việc từ thứ hai đến thứ sáu - các ngày trong tuần.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. I usually go to the folk village on weekends.
2. Last weekend, I went to the folk village alone.
3. I am tired because I have to work on weekdays. 
4. I don't read books but watch movies at home on weekends.
--------------------
<g>피곤하다:</g> To be tired

<g>V/A + 기 때문이다:</g> Because.
<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g> Must/should do something.

The correct answer is 3 because this person works from Monday to Friday.

--------------------
<g>피곤하다:</g>疲れる

<g>V/A + 기 때문이다:</g>なぜなら。
<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g>何かをしなければならない/しなければならない。

この人は月曜日から金曜日まで働いているので、正解は 3 です。

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. I usually go to the folk village on weekends.
2. Last weekend, I went to the folk village alone.
3. I am tired because I have to work on weekdays. 
4. I don't read books but watch movies at home on weekends.
--------------------
<g>피곤하다:</g> To be tired

<g>V/A + 기 때문이다:</g> Because.
<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g> Must/should do something.

The correct answer is 3 because this person works from Monday to Friday.

general.g_text: 오늘 늦게 일어나서 택시를 타고 겨우 제시간에 회사에 도착했습니다. ( ㉠ ) 사무실 전화로 몇 번 걸어 봐도 아무도 전화를 받지 않았습니다. 전화를 잃어버리라는 생각해서 아주 슬픕니다. ( ㉡ ) 그런데 퇴근해서 집에 가 보니 책상 위에 휴대전화가 있었습니다. ( ㉢ ) 앞으로 차분하게 행동하는 습관을 키워야 할 것 같습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm nay tôi dậy muộn nên đã bắt taxi đi làm và đến công ty gần sát giờ làm. ( ㉠ ) Dù tôi thử gọi mấy lần bằng điện thoại của văn phòng nhưng không có ai bắt máy. Tôi nghĩ mình đã làm mất điện thoại rồi nên rất buồn. ( ㉡ ) Nhưng khi tôi tan làm và về đến nhà thì lại thấy điện thoại của tôi đang ở trên bàn học. ( ㉢ ) Từ bây giờ có lẽ tôi phải nuôi dưỡng cho mình thói quen hành động một cách bình tĩnh hơn. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: I got up late today, took a taxi and arrived at the company just in time. <g>( ㉠ )</g> I called by the office phone several times, but no one answered the phone. I am very sad at the thought of losing my phone. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But when I got home from work, I saw my phone on the desk. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I think I need to develop the habit of acting calmly in the future. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Oggi mi sono alzato tardi, ho preso un taxi e sono arrivato in azienda giusto in tempo.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Ho chiamato più volte dal telefono dell'ufficio, ma non ha risposto nessuno. Sono molto triste al pensiero di perdere il mio telefono.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Ma quando sono tornato a casa dal lavoro, ho visto il mio telefono sulla scrivania.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Penso che in futuro dovrò sviluppare l'abitudine di agire con calma.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

Je suis très triste à l'idée de perdre mon téléphone.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Mais en rentrant du travail, j'ai vu mon téléphone sur le bureau.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Je pense que je dois développer l’habitude d’agir calmement à l’avenir.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

Estou muito triste com a ideia de perder meu telefone.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Mas quando cheguei em casa do trabalho, vi meu telefone na mesa.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Acho que preciso desenvolver o hábito de agir com calma no futuro.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

I got up late today, took a taxi and arrived at the company just in time. <g>( ㉠ )</g> I called by the office phone several times, but no one answered the phone. I am very sad at the thought of losing my phone. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But when I got home from work, I saw my phone on the desk. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I think I need to develop the habit of acting calmly in the future. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.hi:
मैं आज देर से उठा, टैक्सी ली और ठीक समय पर कंपनी पहुँच गया।<g>( ㉠ )</g>मैंने कार्यालय के फोन पर कई बार फोन किया, लेकिन किसी ने फोन का जवाब नहीं दिया। मैं अपना फोन खोने के विचार से बहुत दुखी हूं।<g>( ㉡ )</g>लेकिन जब मैं काम से घर लौटा, तो मैंने अपना फोन डेस्क पर देखा।<g>( ㉢ )</g>मुझे लगता है कि मुझे भविष्य में शांति से काम करने की आदत विकसित करनी होगी।<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

I got up late today, took a taxi and arrived at the company just in time. <g>( ㉠ )</g> I called by the office phone several times, but no one answered the phone. I am very sad at the thought of losing my phone. <g>( ㉡ )</g> But when I got home from work, I saw my phone on the desk. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I think I need to develop the habit of acting calmly in the future. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.tr:
Bugün geç kalktım, taksiye bindim ve şirkete tam zamanında vardım.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Ofis telefonundan defalarca aradım ama kimse telefona cevap vermedi. Telefonumu kaybetme düşüncesi beni çok üzüyor.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Ama işten eve geldiğimde telefonumu masanın üzerinde gördüm.<g>( ㉢ )</g>İlerde sakin davranma alışkanlığını geliştirmem gerektiğini düşünüyorum.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

general.g_text: 저는 한 달 전에 한국에 왔습니다. 한국에 가기 전에 한국어를 공부한 지 3개 월 되었습니다. ( ㉠ ) 특히 한국어의 반말과 높임말이 아주 어려워서 가끔 실수할 때가 있습니다. ( ㉡ ) 며칠 전에도 동네 어른께 '빨리 와'라고 잘못 말해서 정말 죄송했습니다. ( ㉢ ) 잘 한국말을 배워서 앞으로는 실수 없이 말하고 싶습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi đến Hàn Quốc một tháng trước. Trước khi tới Hàn Quốc tôi đã học tiếng Hàn được ba tháng. ( ㉠ ) Đặc biệt, lối nói ngang hàng và kính ngữ của tiếng Hàn rất khó nên thi thoảng tôi vẫn mắc lỗi. ( ㉡ ) Vài ngày trước tôi đã nói nhầm với một người lớn  trong xóm là 'Đến đây nhanh lên' nên tôi cảm thấy rất có lỗi. ( ㉢ ) Tôi muốn mình học tiếng Hàn thật giỏi để sau này không còn nói nhầm như vậy nữa. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: I came to Korea a month ago. Before going to Korea, I studied Korean for three months. <g>( ㉠ )</g> In particular, the Korean informal speech and honorifics are very difficult, so there are times when I make mistakes. <g>( ㉡ )</g> Even a few days ago, I was really sorry for saying 'come quickly' to an elder in the neighborhood by mistake. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I want to learn Korean well and speak without mistakes in the future. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Sono venuto in Corea un mese fa. Prima di andare in Corea, ho studiato coreano per tre mesi.<g>( ㉠ )</g>In particolare, il discorso informale coreano e gli onorifici sono molto difficili, quindi ci sono momenti in cui commetto degli errori.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Anche qualche giorno fa mi è dispiaciuto moltissimo aver detto per sbaglio “vieni presto” a un anziano del quartiere.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Voglio imparare bene il coreano e parlare senza errori in futuro.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

I came to Korea a month ago. Before going to Korea, I studied Korean for three months. <g>( ㉠ )</g> In particular, the Korean informal speech and honorifics are very difficult, so there are times when I make mistakes. <g>( ㉡ )</g> Even a few days ago, I was really sorry for saying 'come quickly' to an elder in the neighborhood by mistake. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I want to learn Korean well and speak without mistakes in the future. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis arrivé en Corée il y a un mois. Avant de partir en Corée, j'ai étudié le coréen pendant trois mois.<g>( ㉠ )</g>En particulier, le discours informel coréen et les titres honorifiques sont très difficiles, donc il y a des moments où je fais des erreurs.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Il y a encore quelques jours, j'étais vraiment désolé d'avoir dit par erreur « venez vite » à un aîné du quartier.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Je veux bien apprendre le coréen et parler sans erreurs à l'avenir.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

g_text_translate.es:
Llegué a Corea hace un mes. Antes de ir a Corea, estudié coreano durante tres meses.<g>( ㉠ )</g>En particular, el discurso informal coreano y los honoríficos son muy difíciles, por lo que a veces cometo errores.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Incluso hace unos días, lamenté mucho haberle dicho por error "ven rápido" a un anciano del vecindario.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Quiero aprender bien coreano y hablar sin errores en el futuro.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

g_text_translate.id:

Sebelum berangkat ke Korea, saya belajar bahasa Korea selama tiga bulan.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Khususnya, pidato informal dan sebutan kehormatan bahasa Korea sangat sulit, jadi ada kalanya saya membuat kesalahan.<g>( ㉡ )</g>Bahkan beberapa hari yang lalu, aku benar-benar minta maaf karena tidak sengaja mengatakan 'datang cepat' kepada seorang tetua di lingkungan sekitar.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Saya ingin belajar bahasa Korea dengan baik dan berbicara tanpa kesalahan di masa depan.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

<g>V + 고 싶다:</g>Bir şey yapmayı istemek.
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g>Çünkü.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g>Ne zaman.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. For me, the Korean informal speech and honorifics are easy.
2. I hate Korean language.
3. When speaking Korean, I don't make any mistakes.
4. I want to speak Korean well.
--------------------
<g>실수 없이:</g> Cleverly, without mistakes

<g>V + 고 싶다:</g> To want to do something.
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g> Because.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g> When.

general.g_text: 저는 식당에서 화요일부터 일요일까지 하루 종일 일해서 평일에는 아주 바쁩니다. ( ㉠ ) 그래서 낮에 시장에 못 가고 집에서 자주 인터넷으로 물건을 주문합니다. ( ㉡ ) 물건이 싸고 다양한 종료가 있고 우리 집까지 배달해 줍니다. ( ㉢ ) 저는 인터넷으로 과일이나 채소, 고기도 사고 옷도 삽니다. 직접 가야 하지 않아도 살 수 있어서 아주 편합니다. 할인권도 많이 받습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi làm việc ở nhà hàng cả ngày từ thứ ba đến chủ nhật nên ngày thường rất bận rộn. ( ㉠ ) Vì vậy tôi không thể đi chợ vào ban ngày và thường đặt đồ trên mạng ở nhà. ( ㉡ ) Đồ vật rẻ và có nhiều chủng loại đa dạng và còn được giao đến tận nhà tôi. ( ㉢ ) Tôi cũng mua cả hoa quả hay rau, thịt và quần áo trên mạng. Dù không cần trực tiếp đi đến mà vẫn mua đồ được nên thực sự rất tiện lợi. Còn được nhiều mã giảm giá nữa. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: I work all day from Tuesday to Sunday at the restaurant, so I'm very busy on weekdays. <g>( ㉠ )</g> That's why I can't go to the market during the day, so I often order things online at home. <g>( ㉡ )</g> The goods are cheap, there are various types, and they deliver to my house. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I buy fruits, vegetables, meat, and clothes online. It's very convenient because you can buy it without having to go there yourself. You also get a lot of discount coupons. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Lavoro tutto il giorno dal martedì alla domenica al ristorante, quindi sono molto impegnato nei giorni feriali.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Ecco perché durante il giorno non posso andare al mercato, quindi spesso ordino online a casa.<g>( ㉡ )</g>La merce costa poco, ce ne sono di vari tipi, e la consegnano a casa mia.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Compro frutta, verdura, carne e vestiti online. È molto conveniente perché puoi acquistarlo senza dover andare lì tu stesso. Riceverai anche molti buoni sconto.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

#######

I work all day from Tuesday to Sunday at the restaurant, so I'm very busy on weekdays. <g>( ㉠ )</g> That's why I can't go to the market during the day, so I often order things online at home. <g>( ㉡ )</g> The goods are cheap, there are various types, and they deliver to my house. <g>( ㉢ )</g> I buy fruits, vegetables, meat, and clothes online. It's very convenient because you can buy it without having to go there yourself. You also get a lot of discount coupons. <g>( ㉣ )</g>

C'est très pratique car on peut l'acheter sans avoir à s'y rendre soi-même. Vous bénéficiez également de nombreux bons de réduction.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

general.g_text: 이번 연휴에 저는 제주도에 가려고 합니다. ( ㉠ ) 9월 1일 아침 10시에 김포 공항에서 출발합니다. 9월 4일에 서울에 돌아옵니다. ( ㉡ ) 제주도 경치가 아주 아름답습니다. 한라산에 올라가고 싶고 바다로 가서 수영하기도 하고 싶습니다. ( ㉢ ) 제주도 음식이 아주 맛있습니다. 생선회와 해산물을 많이 먹고 싶습니다. ( ㉣ )

g_text_translate.vi: Vào kỳ nghỉ lễ này tôi định đi Jeju. ( ㉠ ) Tôi xuất phát lúc 10h sáng ngày mùng một tháng 9 tại sân bay Gimpo. Ngày mùng 4 tháng 9 tôi sẽ quay lại Seoul. ( ㉡ ) Phong cảnh ở đảo Jeju rất đẹp. Tôi muốn đi leo núi Halla và muốn đi bơi ở biển nữa. ( ㉢ ) Đồ ăn ở đảo Jeju rất ngon. Tôi muốn ăn thật nhiều gỏi cá và hải sản. ( ㉣ )
g_text_translate.en: I am planning to go to Jeju Island during this holiday. <g>( ㉠ )</g> I will depart from Gimpo Airport at 10 am on September 1st. I will return to Seoul on September 4th. <g>( ㉡ )</g> Jeju Island is very beautiful. I want to climb Halla mountain and go to the sea to swim. <g>( ㉢ )</g> Jeju Island food is very delicious. I want to eat a lot of sashimi and seafood. <g>( ㉣ )</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Sto programmando di andare sull'isola di Jeju durante queste vacanze.<g>( ㉠ )</g>Partirò dall'aeroporto di Gimpo alle 10:00 del 1 settembre. Tornerò a Seoul il 4 settembre.<g>( ㉡ )</g>L'isola di Jeju è molto bella. Voglio scalare il monte Halla e andare al mare a nuotare.<g>( ㉢ )</g>Il cibo dell'isola di Jeju è davvero delizioso. Voglio mangiare molto sashimi e frutti di mare.<g>( ㉣ )</g>

general.g_text: 한국에 온 지 벌써 1 년 되었습다. ㉠ 한국 드라마를 많이 봤는데 한국이 너무 좋아서 한국에 오게 되었습니다. 처음에 1년쯤 살려고 했지만 한국 생활이 재미있어서 더 오래 있기로 했습니다. ㉡ 그런데 처음부터 생활이 안 즐거웠습니다. ㉢ 처음 길도 모르고 한글도 읽을 수 없어서 매일 집에만 있었습니다. 그 때는 고향으로 돌아가고 싶었습니다. 하지만 지금 한국말을 잘하고 친구들도 많이 사귀었습니다. ㉣

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi đã tới Hàn Quốc được một năm. ㉠ Tôi xem phim Hàn Quốc và thấy Hàn Quốc rất xinh đẹp nên đã đến đây. Ban đầu tôi định sống ở Hàn Quốc một năm nhưng vì cuộc sống ở Hàn Quốc rất thú vị nên tôi quyết định ở lâu hơn. ㉡ Nhưng cuộc sống không hề thú vị ngay từ ban đầu. ㉢ Ban đầu tôi không biết đường và cũng không thể đọc tiếng Hàn nên chỉ ở trong nhà. Lúc đó tôi rất muốn về quê. Nhưng bây giờ tôi có thể nói giỏi tiếng Hàn và cũng quen được nhiều bạn bè. ㉣
g_text_translate.en: It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.it:
È già passato un anno da quando sono venuto in Corea.<g>㉠</g>Ho guardato molti drammi coreani e la Corea mi è piaciuta così tanto che sono venuto in Corea. All'inizio avrei vissuto per circa un anno, ma ho deciso di restare più a lungo perché mi piaceva vivere in Corea.<g>㉡</g>Tuttavia, la vita non fu piacevole fin dall’inizio.<g>㉢</g>All'inizio non conoscevo la strada e non sapevo leggere il coreano, quindi restavo a casa tutti i giorni. A quel tempo, volevo tornare nella mia città natale. Ma ora parlo bene il coreano e mi sono fatto molti amici.<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
Cela fait déjà un an que je suis arrivé en Corée.<g>㉠</g>J'ai regardé beaucoup de drames coréens et j'ai tellement aimé la Corée que je suis venu en Corée. Au début, j'allais vivre environ un an, mais j'ai décidé de rester plus longtemps parce que j'aimais vivre en Corée.<g>㉡</g>Cependant, la vie n’était pas agréable dès le début.<g>㉢</g>Au début, je ne connaissais pas le chemin et je ne savais pas lire le coréen, alors je restais à la maison tous les jours. A cette époque, je voulais retourner dans ma ville natale. Mais maintenant, je parle bien coréen et je me suis fait beaucoup d'amis.<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.es:
Ya ha pasado un año desde que vine a Corea.<g>㉠</g>Vi muchos dramas coreanos y me gustó tanto Corea que vine a Corea. Al principio iba a vivir aproximadamente un año, pero decidí quedarme más tiempo porque disfrutaba vivir en Corea.<g>㉡</g>Sin embargo, la vida no fue agradable desde el principio.<g>㉢</g>Al principio no conocía el camino y no sabía leer coreano, así que me quedaba en casa todos los días. En ese momento quería regresar a mi ciudad natal. Pero ahora hablo bien coreano y he hecho muchos amigos.<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.id:
Sudah setahun sejak saya datang ke Korea.<g>㉠</g>Saya menonton banyak drama Korea, dan saya sangat menyukai Korea sehingga saya datang ke Korea. Awalnya saya ingin tinggal sekitar satu tahun, tapi saya memutuskan untuk tinggal lebih lama karena saya menikmati tinggal di Korea.<g>㉡</g>Namun, hidup tidak menyenangkan sejak awal.<g>㉢</g>Pada awalnya, saya tidak tahu jalannya dan tidak bisa membaca bahasa Korea, jadi saya tinggal di rumah setiap hari. Saat itu, saya ingin kembali ke kampung halaman. Tapi sekarang saya bisa berbahasa Korea dengan baik dan punya banyak teman.<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国に来てもう1年が経ちました。<g>㉠</g>韓国ドラマをたくさん見て、韓国が好きになって韓国に来ました。当初は1年ほど住む予定でしたが、韓国での生活がとても楽しかったので延長することにしました。<g>㉡</g>しかし、人生は最初から楽しいものではありませんでした。<g>㉢</g>最初は道も分からず、韓国語も読めなかったので、毎日家に引きこもっていました。その時私は故郷に帰りたいと思っていました。でも今では韓国語を上手に話せるようになり、たくさんの友達ができました。<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.de:
Es ist bereits ein Jahr her, seit ich nach Korea gekommen bin.<g>㉠</g>Ich habe viele koreanische Dramen gesehen und Korea gefiel mir so gut, dass ich nach Korea kam. Zuerst wollte ich etwa ein Jahr dort leben, aber ich beschloss, länger zu bleiben, weil es mir gefiel, in Korea zu leben.<g>㉡</g>Allerdings war das Leben von Anfang an nicht angenehm.<g>㉢</g>Zuerst kannte ich den Weg nicht und konnte kein Koreanisch lesen, also blieb ich jeden Tag zu Hause. Damals wollte ich in meine Heimatstadt zurückkehren. Aber jetzt spreche ich gut Koreanisch und habe viele Freunde gefunden.<g>㉣</g>

#######

It has already been a year since I came to Korea. <g>㉠</g> I watched a lot of Korean dramas, and I liked Korea so much that I came to Korea. At first, I was going to live for about a year, but I decided to stay longer because I enjoyed living in Korea. <g>㉡</g> However, life was not enjoyable from the beginning. <g>㉢</g> At first, I did not know the way and could not read Korean, so I stayed at home every day. At that time, I wanted to return to my hometown. But now I speak Korean well and I have made many friends. <g>㉣</g>

g_text_translate.hi:
मुझे कोरिया आये एक साल हो चुका है।<g>㉠</g>मैंने बहुत सारे कोरियाई नाटक देखे और मुझे कोरिया इतना पसंद आया कि मैं कोरिया आ गया। पहले, मैं लगभग एक साल तक रहने वाला था, लेकिन मैंने लंबे समय तक रहने का फैसला किया क्योंकि मुझे कोरिया में रहना अच्छा लगता था।<g>㉡</g>हालाँकि, जीवन शुरू से ही आनंददायक नहीं था।<g>㉢</g>पहले तो मुझे रास्ता नहीं पता था और मैं कोरियाई नहीं पढ़ सकता था, इसलिए मैं हर दिन घर पर ही रहता था। उस समय, मैं अपने गृहनगर लौटना चाहता था। लेकिन अब मैं अच्छी तरह से कोरियाई भाषा बोलता हूं और मेरे कई दोस्त बन गए हैं।<g>㉣</g>

#######

Kore'ye geleli bir yıl oldu.<g>㉠</g>Çok fazla Kore dizisi izledim ve Kore'yi o kadar sevdim ki Kore'ye geldim. İlk başta yaklaşık bir yıl yaşayacaktım ama Kore'de yaşamaktan keyif aldığım için daha uzun kalmaya karar verdim.<g>㉡</g>Ancak hayat başından beri zevkli değildi.<g>㉢</g>İlk başta yolu bilmiyordum ve Korece okuyamıyordum, bu yüzden her gün evde kaldım. O zamanlar memleketime dönmek istiyordum. Ama artık Koreceyi iyi konuşuyorum ve birçok arkadaş edindim.<g>㉣</g>

सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर 4 है क्योंकि कठिन समय से गुजरने के बाद, चरित्र ने कोरिया में जीवन को अच्छी तरह से अपना लिया है।

#######

Fill the following sentence in the appropriate blank.
'I am happily spending every day with my friends.'

1. ㉠
2. ㉡
3. ㉢
4. ㉣
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄴ 지 되다/지나다:</g> It's been (an amount of time) since someone did something.

The most appropriate answer is 4 because the character, after going through a difficult time, has adapted well to life in Korea.

general.g_text: 어제 지하철을 타고 학교에 갔는데 지하철 안에 한 할머니가 탔습니다. ㉠ 그 할머니는 짐이 많았습니다. 할머니를 보고 한 아저씨가 자리에서 일어났고 할머니가 거기에 앉았습니다. ㉡ 아저씨는 왜 자리에서 일어났을까요? ㉢ 저는 나중에 한국 사람들이 나이가 많은 할머니, 할아버지, 몸이 불편한 사람, 임부에게 자리를 양보한다는 것을 알았습니다. ㉣

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm qua tôi đang đi tàu điện ngầm tới trường thì có một bà cụ cũng đi tàu điện ngầm. ㉠ Bà ấy có rất nhiều hành lý. Một chú nhìn thấy bà ấy rồi đứng dậy khỏi ghế, và bà cụ đã ngồi lên đó. ㉡ Vì sao chú ấy lại đứng dậy khỏi chỗ ngồi? ㉢ Sau này tôi mới biết là người Hàn Quốc nhường chỗ cho những ông bà cụ nhiều tuổi, người khuyết tật, người có thai. ㉣
g_text_translate.en: I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Ieri sono andato a scuola in metropolitana e una vecchia signora è salita sulla metropolitana.<g>㉠</g>La vecchia signora aveva molti bagagli. Vedendo la vecchia signora, uno zio si alzò dal suo posto e la vecchia signora si sedette lì.<g>㉡</g>Perché lo zio si è alzato dal suo posto?<g>㉢</g>In seguito ho saputo che i coreani cedono il posto agli anziani, ai disabili e alle donne incinte.<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis allé à l'école en métro hier et une vieille dame est montée dans le métro.<g>㉠</g>La vieille dame avait beaucoup de bagages. En voyant la vieille dame, un oncle s'est levé de son siège et la vieille dame s'est assise là.<g>㉡</g>Pourquoi l'oncle s'est-il levé de son siège ?<g>㉢</g>J'ai appris plus tard que les Coréens cédaient leur place aux personnes âgées, aux personnes handicapées et aux femmes enceintes.<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.es:
Ayer fui a la escuela en el metro y una anciana se subió al metro.<g>㉠</g>La anciana tenía mucho equipaje. Al ver a la anciana, un tío se levantó de su asiento y la anciana se sentó allí.<g>㉡</g>¿Por qué el tío se levantó de su asiento?<g>㉢</g>Más tarde supe que los coreanos ceden sus asientos a personas mayores, discapacitadas y mujeres embarazadas.<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.id:
Saya pergi ke sekolah dengan kereta bawah tanah kemarin, dan seorang wanita tua naik kereta bawah tanah.<g>㉠</g>Wanita tua itu membawa banyak barang bawaan. Melihat wanita tua itu, seorang paman bangkit dari tempat duduknya dan wanita tua itu duduk disana.<g>㉡</g>Mengapa pamanmu bangun dari tempat duduknya?<g>㉢</g>Saya kemudian mengetahui bahwa orang Korea menyerahkan kursi mereka kepada orang tua, orang cacat, dan wanita hamil.<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.ja:
昨日地下鉄で学校に行ったのですが、おばあさんが地下鉄に乗りました。<g>㉠</g>おばあさんはたくさんの荷物を持っていました。おばあさんを見て、おじさんが席を立ち、おばあさんはそこに座りました。<g>㉡</g>おじさんはなぜ席から立ち上がったのですか？<g>㉢</g>後で知ったのですが、韓国人はお年寄りや障害者、妊婦には席を譲ります。<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. Seeing the old lady, an uncle got up from his seat and the old lady sat there. <g>㉡</g> Why did you the uncle get up from his seat? <g>㉢</g> I later learned that Koreans give up their seats to old people, disabled people, and pregnant women. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.de:
Ich bin gestern mit der U-Bahn zur Schule gefahren und eine alte Dame ist in die U-Bahn eingestiegen.<g>㉠</g>Die alte Dame hatte viel Gepäck. Als ein Onkel die alte Dame sah, stand er von seinem Platz auf und die alte Dame setzte sich hin.<g>㉡</g>Warum bist du, der Onkel, von seinem Platz aufgestanden?<g>㉢</g>Später erfuhr ich, dass Koreaner ihre Plätze alten Menschen, Behinderten und schwangeren Frauen überlassen.<g>㉣</g>

#######

I went to school on the subway yesterday, and an old lady got on the subway. <g>㉠</g> The old lady had a lot of luggage. g_text_translate.th:
เมื่อวานฉันไปโรงเรียนด้วยรถไฟใต้ดิน และมีหญิงชราคนหนึ่งขึ้นรถไฟใต้ดิน<g>㉠</g>หญิงชรามีสัมภาระมากมาย เมื่อเห็นหญิงชรา ลุงก็ลุกขึ้นจากที่นั่ง หญิงชรานั่งอยู่ที่นั่น<g>㉡</g>เหตุใดคุณลุงจึงลุกจากที่นั่ง?<g>㉢</g>ฉันรู้ทีหลังว่าคนเกาหลีสละที่นั่งให้กับคนชรา ผู้พิการ และสตรีมีครรภ์<g>㉣</g>

g_text_translate.hi:
मैं कल सबवे से स्कूल गया, और एक बूढ़ी औरत सबवे पर चढ़ी।<g>㉠</g>बुढ़िया के पास बहुत सारा सामान था। बुढ़िया को देखकर एक चाचा अपनी सीट से उठ गए और बुढ़िया वहीं बैठ गई।<g>㉡</g>अंकल आप अपनी सीट से क्यों उठे?<g>㉢</g>मुझे बाद में पता चला कि कोरियाई लोग अपनी सीटें बूढ़ों, विकलांग लोगों और गर्भवती महिलाओं के लिए छोड़ देते हैं।<g>㉣</g>

g_text_translate.tr:
Dün okula metroyla gittim ve yaşlı bir kadın metroya bindi.<g>㉠</g>Yaşlı kadının bir sürü bagajı vardı. content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Tôi đã nhường chỗ cho bà cụ.
2. Hôm qua tôi đi học bằng tàu điện ngầm.
3. Người chú xuống ở ga tiếp theo.
4. Bà cụ đó đau chân nên đã ngồi xuống.
--------------------
양보하다: Nhường
내리다: Xuống (xe bus, tàu điện, taxi,...)
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. I gave up my seat to the old lady.
2. I went to school by subway yesterday.
3. The man got off at the next station.
4. The old lady sat down because her legs hurt.
--------------------

general.g_text: 한국의 수도, 서울은 경제와 정치의 중심지이고 일년 내내 관광객이 찾아옵니다. ㉠ 그래서 서울은 늘 복잡합니다. 그렇지만 서울의 얼굴은 이것이 전부가 아닙니다. ㉡ 서울은 천년의 역사를 가지고 있습니다. 서울의 중심에는 여러 고궁과 유적들이 있습니다. ㉢ 현대와 과거를 모두 만날 수 있는 서울은 앞으로도 더 젊고 즐거운 도시로 발전할 것입니다. ㉣

g_text_translate.vi: Seoul, thủ đô của Hàn Quốc là trung tâm kinh tế, chính trị và được du khách tìm đến quanh năm. ㉠ Vì vậy mà Seoul luôn đông đúc. Nhưng đó không phải là toàn bộ khuôn mặt của Seoul. ㉡ Seoul có lịch sử ngàn năm. Ở trung tâm Seoul có rất nhiều cố cung và các di tích. ㉢ Seoul, nơi bạn có thể bắt gặp cả hiện đại và quá khứ sẽ còn phát triển thành một thành phố trẻ trung và vui vẻ hơn nữa. ㉣
g_text_translate.en: Seoul, the capital of South Korea, is the economic and political center and attracts tourists all year round. <g>㉠</g> So, Seoul is always crowded. However, this is not all of Seoul's face. <g>㉡</g> Seoul has a thousand years of history. In the center of Seoul, there are several ancient palaces and ruins. <g>㉢</g> Seoul, where you can meet both the present and the past, will continue to develop into a younger and more enjoyable city. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.it:
Seoul, la capitale della Corea del Sud, è il centro economico e politico e attira turisti tutto l'anno.<g>㉠</g>Quindi, Seoul è sempre affollata. Tuttavia, questo non è tutto il volto di Seoul.<g>㉡</g>Seoul ha mille anni di storia. Nel centro di Seoul ci sono diversi palazzi e rovine antichi.<g>㉢</g>Seoul, dove puoi incontrare sia il presente che il passato, continuerà a svilupparsi in una città più giovane e divertente.<g>㉣</g>

#######

Au centre de Séoul se trouvent plusieurs palais et ruines antiques.<g>㉢</g>Séoul, où vous pourrez rencontrer à la fois le présent et le passé, continuera à se développer pour devenir une ville plus jeune et plus agréable.<g>㉣</g>
