โซล เมืองหลวงของเกาหลีใต้ เป็นศูนย์กลางทางเศรษฐกิจและการเมืองและดึงดูดนักท่องเที่ยวตลอดทั้งปี<g>㉠</g>ดังนั้นโซลจึงมีผู้คนหนาแน่นอยู่เสมอ อย่างไรก็ตาม นี่ไม่ใช่ใบหน้าของโซลทั้งหมด<g>㉡</g>โซลมีประวัติศาสตร์ยาวนานนับพันปี ในใจกลางกรุงโซลมีพระราชวังและซากปรักหักพังโบราณหลายแห่ง<g>㉢</g>โซลที่คุณจะได้พบกับทั้งอดีตและปัจจุบัน จะยังคงพัฒนาเป็นเมืองที่อายุน้อยกว่าและสนุกสนานยิ่งขึ้น<g>㉣</g>

#######

Seoul, the capital of South Korea, is the economic and political center and attracts tourists all year round. <g>㉠</g> So, Seoul is always crowded. However, this is not all of Seoul's face. <g>㉡</g> Seoul has a thousand years of history. In the center of Seoul, there are several ancient palaces and ruins. <g>㉢</g> Seoul, where you can meet both the present and the past, will continue to develop into a younger and more enjoyable city. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.pt:
Seul, capital da Coreia do Sul, é o centro económico e político e atrai turistas durante todo o ano.<g>㉠</g>Então, Seul está sempre lotada. No entanto, esta não é toda a cara de Seul.<g>㉡</g>Seul tem mil anos de história. No centro de Seul, existem vários palácios e ruínas antigas.<g>㉢</g>Seul, onde você pode conhecer o presente e o passado, continuará a se transformar em uma cidade mais jovem e agradável.<g>㉣</g>

दक्षिण कोरिया की राजधानी सियोल, आर्थिक और राजनीतिक केंद्र है और पूरे साल पर्यटकों को आकर्षित करती है।<g>㉠</g>इसलिए, सियोल में हमेशा भीड़ रहती है। हालाँकि, यह सब सियोल का चेहरा नहीं है।<g>㉡</g>सियोल का इतिहास एक हजार साल पुराना है। सियोल के केंद्र में कई प्राचीन महल और खंडहर हैं।<g>㉢</g>सियोल, जहां आप वर्तमान और अतीत दोनों से मिल सकते हैं, एक युवा और अधिक आनंददायक शहर के रूप में विकसित होता रहेगा।<g>㉣</g>

Ancak bu Seul'ün yüzünün tamamı değil.<g>㉡</g>Seul'ün bin yıllık bir tarihi var. Seul'ün merkezinde birçok antik saray ve kalıntı bulunmaktadır.<g>㉢</g>Hem bugünle hem de geçmişle buluşabileceğiniz Seul, daha genç ve daha keyifli bir şehir olarak gelişmeye devam edecek.<g>㉣</g>

general.g_text: ㉠ 요즘 인터넷 홈페이지를 이용할 때, 현금 카드를 만들 때 등 비밀번호가 필요한 경우가 많습니다. ㉡ 비밀번호는 잊어버리기 쉬워서 똑같은 비밀번호를 여기저기 사용하거나 자신의 생일, 전화번호로 비밀번호를 만드는 경우가 있습니다. ㉢ 그러니까 똑같은 비밀번호 사용을 피하는 것이 좋습니다. ㉣

g_text_translate.vi: ㉠ Ngày nay, có nhiều trường hợp cần có mật khẩu, chẳng hạn như khi sử dụng một trang web hoặc khi làm thẻ rút tiền mặt. ㉡ Mật khẩu rất dễ bị quên, vì vậy có nhiều trường hợp sử dụng cùng một mật khẩu cho nhiều chỗ hoặc tạo mật khẩu giống ngày sinh hoặc số điện thoại của chính mình. ㉢ Vì vậy, nên tránh sử dụng mật khẩu giống nhau. ㉣
g_text_translate.en: <g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.it:
<g>㉠</g>Al giorno d'oggi, quando si utilizza la home page di Internet o quando si effettua una carta bancomat è spesso necessaria una password.<g>㉡</g>Le password sono facili da dimenticare, quindi ci sono casi in cui la stessa password viene utilizzata qua e là, oppure le password vengono create con la data di nascita o il numero di telefono.<g>㉢</g>Pertanto si consiglia di evitare di utilizzare la stessa password.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.fr:
<g>㉠</g>De nos jours, un mot de passe est souvent requis lors de l'utilisation de la page d'accueil Internet ou lors de la création d'une carte de paiement.<g>㉡</g>Les mots de passe sont faciles à oublier, il existe donc des cas où le même mot de passe est utilisé ici et là, ou des mots de passe sont créés avec la date de naissance ou le numéro de téléphone d'une personne.<g>㉢</g>Il est donc recommandé d’éviter d’utiliser le même mot de passe.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.es:
<g>㉠</g>Hoy en día, a menudo se requiere una contraseña cuando se utiliza la página de inicio de Internet o cuando se hace una tarjeta de efectivo.<g>㉡</g>Las contraseñas son fáciles de olvidar, por lo que hay casos en los que se utiliza la misma contraseña aquí y allá, o se crean contraseñas con la fecha de nacimiento o el número de teléfono.<g>㉢</g>Por ello, se recomienda evitar utilizar la misma contraseña.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.id:
<g>㉠</g>Saat ini, kata sandi sering kali diperlukan saat menggunakan situs Internet atau saat membuat kartu tunai.<g>㉡</g>Kata sandi mudah untuk dilupakan, jadi ada kalanya kata sandi yang sama digunakan di sana-sini, atau kata sandi dibuat dengan tanggal ulang tahun atau nomor telepon seseorang.<g>㉢</g>Oleh karena itu, disarankan untuk menghindari penggunaan kata sandi yang sama.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.ja:
<g>㉠</g>最近では、インターネットのホームページを利用したり、キャッシュカードを作成したりする際に、パスワードを求められることが多くなりました。<g>㉡</g>パスワードは忘れやすいので、あちこちで同じパスワードを使い回したり、誕生日や電話番号などでパスワードを作成したりする場合があります。<g>㉢</g>したがって、同じパスワードを使用しないことをお勧めします。<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.de:
<g>㉠</g>Heutzutage ist bei der Nutzung der Internet-Homepage oder bei der Erstellung einer EC-Karte häufig ein Passwort erforderlich.<g>㉡</g>Da Passwörter leicht vergessen werden, gibt es Fälle, in denen hier und da dasselbe Passwort verwendet wird oder Passwörter mit dem Geburtstag oder der Telefonnummer erstellt werden.<g>㉢</g>Daher wird empfohlen, die Verwendung desselben Passworts zu vermeiden.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
<g>㉠</g>如今，在使用互联网主页或制作现金卡时，常常需要输入密码。<g>㉡</g>密码很容易忘记，因此有时会到处使用相同的密码，或者使用某人的生日或电话号码创建密码。<g>㉢</g>因此，建议避免使用相同的密码。<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
<g>㉠</g>如今，在使用互聯網主頁或製作現金卡時，常常需要輸入密碼。<g>㉡</g>密碼很容易忘記，因此有時會到處使用相同的密碼，或者使用某人的生日或電話號碼創建密碼。<g>㉢</g>因此，建議避免使用相同的密碼。<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.ru:
<g>㉠</g>В наши дни пароль часто требуется при использовании домашней страницы в Интернете или при оформлении банковской карты.<g>㉡</g>Пароли легко забыть, поэтому бывают случаи, когда здесь и там используется один и тот же пароль или пароли создаются с указанием дня рождения или номера телефона.<g>㉢</g>Поэтому рекомендуется избегать использования одного и того же пароля.<g>㉣</g>

g_text_translate.th:
<g>㉠</g>ทุกวันนี้ รหัสผ่านมักจำเป็นเมื่อใช้หน้าแรกของอินเทอร์เน็ตหรือเมื่อทำบัตรกดเงินสด<g>㉡</g>รหัสผ่านนั้นลืมได้ง่าย จึงมีบางกรณีที่มีการใช้รหัสผ่านเดียวกันที่นี่หรือที่นั่น หรือรหัสผ่านถูกสร้างขึ้นโดยระบุวันเกิดหรือหมายเลขโทรศัพท์<g>㉢</g>ดังนั้นจึงแนะนำให้หลีกเลี่ยงการใช้รหัสผ่านเดียวกัน<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.pt:
<g>㉠</g>Hoje em dia, muitas vezes é necessária uma senha ao usar a página inicial da Internet ou ao fazer um cartão bancário.<g>㉡</g>As senhas são fáceis de esquecer, por isso há casos em que a mesma senha é usada aqui e ali, ou as senhas são criadas com a data de nascimento ou número de telefone.<g>㉢</g>Portanto, é recomendado evitar o uso da mesma senha.<g>㉣</g>

#######

<g>㉠</g> These days, a password is often required when using the Internet homepage or when making a cash card. <g>㉡</g> Passwords are easy to forget, so there are cases where the same password is used here and there, or passwords are created with one's birthday or phone number. <g>㉢</g> Therefore, it is recommended to avoid using the same password. <g>㉣</g>
g_text_translate.hi:
<g>㉠</g>आजकल, इंटरनेट होमपेज का उपयोग करते समय या कैश कार्ड बनाते समय अक्सर पासवर्ड की आवश्यकता होती है।<g>㉡</g>पासवर्ड भूलना आसान है, इसलिए ऐसे मामले भी हैं जहां एक ही पासवर्ड का उपयोग यहां और वहां किया जाता है, या किसी के जन्मदिन या फोन नंबर के साथ पासवर्ड बनाया जाता है।<g>㉢</g>इसलिए, एक ही पासवर्ड का उपयोग करने से बचने की सलाह दी जाती है।<g>㉣</g>

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
<g>㉠</g>Günümüzde internet ana sayfasını kullanırken veya banka kartı hazırlarken sıklıkla şifreye ihtiyaç duyulmaktadır.<g>㉡</g>Şifrelerin unutulması kolaydır, bu nedenle her yerde aynı şifrenin kullanıldığı veya şifrelerin kişinin doğum günü veya telefon numarasıyla oluşturulduğu durumlar vardır.<g>㉢</g>Bu nedenle aynı şifreyi kullanmaktan kaçınmanız önerilir.<g>㉣</g>

1. You don't need a password to make a cash card.
2. It is recommended to use a similar password so that you don't forget.
3. It's hard to forget the password, but you can find it again.
4. The same password is used in many cases.
--------------------
<g>여기저기:</g> Here and there
<g>똑같다:</g> To be the same, to be equal 

<g>V + 도록:</g> In order to, so that.
explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. कैश कार्ड बनाने के लिए आपको पासवर्ड की आवश्यकता नहीं है।
2. एक समान पासवर्ड का उपयोग करने की अनुशंसा की जाती है ताकि आप भूल न जाएं।
3. पासवर्ड भूलना कठिन है, लेकिन आप इसे दोबारा ढूंढ सकते हैं।
4. कई मामलों में एक ही पासवर्ड का इस्तेमाल किया जाता है.
------------------------
<g>여기저기:</g>इधर - उधर
<g>똑같다:</g>समान होना, समान होना

<g>V + 도록:</g>ताकि, ताकि.

explain.tr:
Bu metindeki içeriğe uygun olanı seçin.

1. Bankamatik kartı oluşturmak için şifreye ihtiyacınız yoktur.
2. Unutmamanız için benzer bir şifre kullanmanız tavsiye edilir.
3. Şifreyi unutmak zordur ama tekrar bulabilirsiniz.
4. Çoğu durumda aynı şifre kullanılır.
--------------------
<g>여기저기:</g>Burada ve orada
<g>똑같다:</g>Aynı olmak, eşit olmak

<g>V + 도록:</g>Bunu yapmak için.
